title: Cut origin load 80% with Workers
meta_description: Cut origin load 80% with Cloudflare Workers — cache static assets, read-only API responses, and measure p95 latency drops from 412 ms to 89 ms while saving 42% on AWS bills.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn 40% of their AWS bill serving static assets and read-only API responses.

Cloudflare Workers can cache 80% of that traffic at the edge for $0.

https://kubaik.github.io/cut-origin-load-80-with-workers
